name: orm-benchmark
description: Benchmark de desempenho: SQL puro (postgres.js) vs Drizzle ORM sobre PostgreSQL.

scripts.db:up: mkdir -p results/.snapshot && chmod 777 results/.snapshot && docker compose up -d --wait
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait && npm run seed
scripts.bench:full: node --env-file=.env bench.js sql --iterations=200 --warmup=50 --csv && node --env-file=.env bench.js drizzle --iterations=200 --warmup=50 --csv && node --env-file=.env bench.js prisma --iterations=200 --warmup=50 --csv && node --env-file=.env bench.js prisma-query --iterations=200 --warmup=50 --csv
scripts.clean: rm -rf results/k6/* results/explain/* results/*.csv results/consolidated.* logs/
